titles.title: Trading a Cross For a Crown

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I started out with a made up mind to one day cross the finish line I'm pressing toward the mark and for the prize At times I've had to stand my ground and Satan's tried to turn me around But I will not be hindered by his lies

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm not gonna walk away, I've got too much at stake I've come too far to turn back now Every battle that I have fought will soon be forgot I'm trading this old cross in for a crown

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can almost hear them cheer me on and see the ones that have reached home They now await for us to win this race A banquet like we've never known will be held at God's royal throne There we'll be rewarded for our faith
